programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Elimination Challenge: Dish They've Missed the Most
programme.desc: The contestants are reunited with a family member and must cook a meal their loved ones have missed the most.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Masterclass 11
programme.desc: The final 6 contestants have their last class with Gary and Matt before finals week.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Finals Week: Guillaume at Bennelong
programme.desc: The remaining 6 contestants must prepare a dish at Bennelong, a Sydney Opera House restaurant.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Finals Week: Perfect Sauce for a Perfect Stake
programme.desc: The second elimination challenge of finals week features MasterChef UK's John Torode as guest judge.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Finals Week: Signature Dishes
programme.desc: Each hopeful is paired with a culinary legend and has 90 minutes to produce a worthy signature dish.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - MasterChef 2012 Finale
programme.desc: Andy, Audra and Julia faced off in the Grand Finale, consisting of three challenges.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 01 - Auditions
programme.desc: The competition kicks off with 1000 amateur cooks.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 01 - Finding The Top 12
programme.desc: The Top 24 amateur cooks face three gruelling challenges.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 01 - 12 Ways With Chicken
programme.desc: The Top 12 contestants move into a luxury home on Auckland's North Shore.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 01 - Signature Dish Challenge
programme.desc: The Top 11 contestants face a tough challenge in the MasterChef kitchen.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 01 - A Day At The Races
programme.desc: The Top 10 contestants have a day at the races at Ellerslie.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 01 - Pie Wars
programme.desc: The Top 9 contestants must make their own pastry and cook two pies.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 01 - Canape Frenzy
programme.desc: The Top 8 contestants face a daunting team challenge.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 01 - Asian Invention Test
programme.desc: The Top 7 contestants face a challenging invention test.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 01 - Seafood Barbecue Challenge
programme.desc: The Top 6 contestants face a team challenge.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 01 - Super Hard Dessert
programme.desc: The new Top 6 contestants face their most technically-demanding challenge so far.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 01 - Guess Who's Coming To Dinner
programme.desc: The final five contestants cook a 10-course degustation dinner.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 01 - Cookbook Challenge
programme.desc: In the MasterChef New Zealand semi-final, the top four contestants try to impress.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 01 - The Grand Final
programme.desc: The two finalists face gruelling challenges to decide who will win the first-ever MasterChef New Zealand.

programme.title: MasterChef UK Junior Season 02 - EP1
programme.desc: Today’s first four cooks have to dazzle MasterChef judge, John Torode, and new judge, Donal Skehan.

programme.title: MasterChef UK Junior Season 02 - EP2
programme.desc: Today’s four cooks must wow MasterChef judges.

programme.title: MasterChef UK Junior Season 02 - EP3
programme.desc: Today’s four cooks must dazzle MasterChef judge, John Torode, and new judge, Donal Skehan.

programme.title: MasterChef UK Junior Season 02 - EP4
programme.desc: Today’s four cooks must win over MasterChef judge, John Torode, and new judge, Donal Skehan.

programme.title: MasterChef UK Junior Season 02 - EP5
programme.desc: It’s quarter final day on Junior MasterChef and four winning cooks return to dazzle

programme.title: MasterChef UK Junior Season 02 - EP6
programme.desc: Today’s four cooks must wow MasterChef judge, John Torode, and new judge, Donal Skehan.

programme.title: MasterChef UK Junior Season 02 - EP7
programme.desc: Today’s four cooks must impress MasterChef judge, John Torode, and food blogger and cook, Donal Skehan.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - EP12
programme.desc: The contestant picks one case which is theirs to keep, if they choose, until its unsealing at the end of the game. As each of the 25 cases is opened, the likelihood of the player having a valuable cash amount in their case decreases or increases, with ‘the Banker’ tempting the player throughout the game. (12 out of 39)

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - EP16
programme.desc: The contestant picks one case which is theirs to keep, if they choose, until its unsealing at the end of the game. As each of the 25 cases is opened, the likelihood of the player having a valuable cash amount in their case decreases or increases, with ‘the Banker’ tempting the player throughout the game. (16 out of 39)

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - EP1
programme.desc: Contestants get a chance to win money, from one penny to $1 million.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - EP2
programme.desc: Contestants get a chance to win money, from one penny to $1 million.

programme.title: MasterChef UK Junior Season 02 - EP8
programme.desc: Today’s four cooks must win over MasterChef judge, John Torode, and food blogger and cook, Donal Skehan.

programme.title: MasterChef UK Junior Season 02 - EP9
programme.desc: Today’s four cooks must wow MasterChef judge, John Torode, and new judge, food blogger and cook, Donal Skehan.

programme.title: MasterChef UK Junior Season 02 - EP10
programme.desc: It’s quarter final day on Junior MasterChef and four winning cooks return to dazzle.

programme.title: MasterChef UK Junior Season 02 - EP11
programme.desc: It’s Finals week on Junior MasterChef and the final four are now competing to be the best cook in the country.

programme.title: MasterChef UK Junior Season 02 - EP12
programme.desc: The pressure is on for the final four cooks left in the competition.

programme.title: MasterChef UK Junior Season 02 - EP13
programme.desc: The four Junior MasterChef finalists are given the challenge of feeding 50 people.

programme.title: MasterChef UK Junior Season 02 - EP14
programme.desc: It’s the penultimate Junior MasterChef challenge.

programme.title: MasterChef UK Junior Season 02 - EP15
programme.desc: It’s the Final of Junior MasterChef. The four best cooks have one last chance.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 05 - Premiere
programme.desc: 22 contestants are welcomed to Melbourne with their first challenge at the MCG.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 05 - Protein Pick Face Off Challenge
programme.desc: After winning the previous challenge, the girls pick the protein they would be cooking with.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 05 - Elimination Challenge 1
programme.desc: The worst performing contestants from the last challenge head into the series' first elimination challenge.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 05 - MasterClass 1
programme.desc: Filmed in front of a live audience, George cooks calf's liver and Gary cooks a sour cherry dessert.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 05 - Barossa Boot Camp Day 1
programme.desc: Contestants are tasked with breaking down a whole lamb after a quick masterclass from a professional butcher.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 05 - Barossa Boot Camp Day 2
programme.desc: Contestants faced a tag-team challenge set by MasterChef favourite Maggie Beer.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 05 - Barossa Boot Camp Day 3
programme.desc: The teams face a seafood relay challenge: shucking oysters, peeling prawns and filleting flathead.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 05 - Elimination Challenge 2
programme.desc: Contestants up for elimination are given two and a half hours to revisit their proteins.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 05 - MasterClass 2
programme.desc: The Barossa Boot Camp comes to an end with a MasterClass featuring great local produce.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 05 - Kids Week Sunday Challenge
programme.desc: To Begin Kids Week, the Mystery Box Challenge returned with a twist, followed by the Invention Test.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 05 - Immunity Challenge 1
programme.desc: Five contestants face off in an immunity challenge with a twist.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 05 - Offsite Challenge 1
programme.desc: The contestants split into teams to make lunch for over 450 very hungry grammar school children.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 05 - Elimination Challenge 3
programme.desc: The tuck shop losing Blue Team faces a two-round Elimination: a skills test followed by a pressure test.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 05 - MasterClass 3
programme.desc: Chef Stephanie Alexander visits the kitchen to give a cookery workshop.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 05 - Offsite Challenge 2
programme.desc: It's Italian week and the four teams must sell as many meals as possible in Little Italy.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 05 - Pressure Test 1
programme.desc: Five amateur chefs make quail ravioli to determine who stays in the contest.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 05 - MasterChef Pizzeria Challenge
programme.desc: Two teams of contestants are left in charge of running a pizza restaurant service.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 05 - Elimination Challenge 4
programme.desc: The 8 losing team competitors must cook their best Italian food to try and keep their places.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 05 - MasterClass 4
programme.desc: Antonio Carluccio shows the contestants how to make silk handkerchief pasta alla Genovese.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 05 - Western Australia Team Challenge 1
programme.desc: The top 15 contestants split into teams in Fremantle and go on a fishing trip.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 05 - Immunity Challenge 2
programme.desc: The 7 members of the winning team are vying for immunity, but there is a twist.

programme.title: Fear Factor USA - EP27
programme.desc: Fear Factor is the competition reality series in which contestants must face their fears.

programme.title: Fear Factor USA - EP28
programme.desc: Fear Factor is the competition reality series in which contestants must face their fears.

programme.title: Fear Factor USA - EP34
programme.desc: Fear Factor is the competition reality series in which contestants must face their fears.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA - The Bees Are So Angry
programme.desc: Five teams of two compete for $100,000 dollars on a five stunt, 2 hour spectacular.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA - Leeches & Shaved Heads & Tear Gas
programme.desc: In a special 2 hour Fear Factor five teams of 2 are bungeed off a cliff while tied under a helicopter.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA - Snake Bite
programme.desc: Four couples compete for a grand prize of $50,000.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA - Roach Coach
programme.desc: Four teams of two compete for $50,000 as they are locked in a cage and sunk underwater.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA - Broken Hearts & Blood Baths
programme.desc: Four teams of exes must deal with 3 stunts and each other.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA - Tall Crappacino
programme.desc: Four teams of two attempt to win $50,000.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA - Hee Haw! Hee Haw!
programme.desc: Four sets of twins compete for $50,000 as they are electric shocked.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA - Scorpion Tales
programme.desc: Four teams of family members compete for $50,000 as they careen into a quarry full of live ammunition.
